ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Total number of games played by the player */,
  "mpg" REAL /* Average minutes played per game */,
  "orpm" REAL /* Offensive rebounds per minute */,
  "drpm" REAL /* Defensive rebounds per minute */,
  "rpm" REAL /* Overall rebounds per minute */,
  "wins" REAL /* Total win shares attributed to the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "draft_round" TEXT /* Round in which the player was drafted */,
  "draft_pick" INTEGER /* Pick number in the draft */,
  "college" TEXT /* College the player attended (if applicable) */,
  "contract_expiration" INTEGER /* Year the player's current contract expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach of the team */,
  "owner" TEXT /* Name of the team owner */,
  "gm" TEXT /* Name of the general manager */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_coach_id FOREIGN KEY ("coach_id") REFERENCES coaches ("coach_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game (e.g., home, away) */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the game went into overtime */,
  "referees" TEXT /* Names of the referees for the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network that broadcast the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each set of statistics */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game in which these stats were collected */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Points scored by the player in the game */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Assists made by the player in the game */,
  "rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the game */,
  "steals" INTEGER /* Steals made by the player in the game */,
  "blocks" INTEGER /* Blocks made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Field goals made by the player in the game */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Field goals attempted by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Three-pointers made by the player in the game */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Three-pointers attempted by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Free throws made by the player in the game */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Free throws attempted by the player in the game */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Turnovers made by the player in the game */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Personal fouls by the player in the game */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus-minus rating for the player in the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Years of coaching experience */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the coach (e.g., head coach, assistant coach) */,
  "previous_experience" TEXT /* Previous coaching experience (e.g., team, role) */,
  "achievements" TEXT /* Notable achievements or awards */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the injured player */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury sustained */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date of the injury occurrence */,
  "return_date" TEXT /* Expected return date after injury */,
  "injury_severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, moderate, severe) */,
  "rehab_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rehabilitation process */,
  "rehab_end_date" TEXT /* Expected end date of the rehabilitation process */,
  "rehab_status" TEXT /* Current status of the rehabilitation (e.g., in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "season_stats" (
  "season_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season stat record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "season_year" INTEGER /* Year of the season */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored by the player in the season */,
  "total_assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player in the season */,
  "total_rebounds" INTEGER /* Total rebounds by the player in the season */,
  "total_wins" INTEGER /* Total wins attributed to the player in the season */,
  "field_goals_made" INTEGER /* Total field goals made by the player in the season */,
  "field_goals_attempted" INTEGER /* Total field goals attempted by the player in the season */,
  "three_pointers_made" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers made by the player in the season */,
  "three_pointers_attempted" INTEGER /* Total three-pointers attempted by the player in the season */,
  "free_throws_made" INTEGER /* Total free throws made by the player in the season */,
  "free_throws_attempted" INTEGER /* Total free throws attempted by the player in the season */,
  "turnovers" INTEGER /* Total turnovers made by the player in the season */,
  "personal_fouls" INTEGER /* Total personal fouls by the player in the season */,
  "plus_minus" REAL /* Average plus-minus rating in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_season_stats_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, coach, analyst) */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_health" (
  "health_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player health record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player */,
  "last_checkup" TEXT /* Date of the last health checkup */,
  "blood_type" TEXT /* Blood type of the player */,
  "allergies" TEXT /* Any known allergies */,
  "medical_conditions" TEXT /* Any known medical conditions */,
  "last_medical_exam" TEXT /* Date of the last medical examination */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("health_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_health_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who generated the report */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the report was generated */,
  "data_summary" TEXT /* Summary of the data included in the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., player performance, team efficiency) */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report (e.g., game stats, season stats) */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of visualization used in the report (e.g., chart, graph, table) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
